subcodes.first_line: This is the Day wherein the mysteries have been unveiled and the rivers have flowed, and the Tongue of Grandeur hath spoken in the prison of 'Akká [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه ظهرت الاسرار و جرت الانهار و نطق لسان العظمه فی سجن عکاء الملک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @station of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment
